# Jeeliz FaceFilter

This directory contains the pinned browser build of
[jeelizFaceFilter](https://github.com/jeeliz/jeelizFaceFilter) and its default
neural network model. The files are from commit `6f26951` and are licensed
under Apache-2.0; see [LICENSE](LICENSE).

The application loads the library locally so camera filters do not depend on a
third-party CDN at runtime.
